rules.assertion: parse UTC-aware timestamps; issued_at <= not_before < expires_at; (expires_at-not_before).total_seconds() <= 14400
observed_at <= now <= valid_until and (now-observed_at).total_seconds() <= 120 and (valid_until-observed_at).total_seconds() <= 120
persistent UTC expiry and process monotonic deadline are both valid; the earlier expiry denies the operation
backup database_generation equals current expected Ledger generation and receipt digest/bytes SHA-256 match exact candidate binding
Schema is exactly 6; all domain, legacy Lease and Pilot Lease facts are zero before issuance; generation is positive and exact

inputs: canonical legacy table digests before and after
rules.assertion: under one BEGIN IMMEDIATE the locked input version is 5, required DDL executes in order, PRAGMA user_version and ledger_meta become 6, every frozen postcondition passes before commit, and failure rolls back all schema/version changes; legacy v5 table schema and primary-key-ordered rows are hashed by the exact frozen canonical algorithm and before/after aggregates match; integrity and foreign-key checks pass
realpath(ledger_path) equals realpath(project_root)/.colameta/ledger/work-items.sqlite3
every resolved private/runtime path is strictly contained under pilot_root; no path is equal to pilot_root when a file/subdirectory is required
pilot_root is neither equal to nor nested within project_root, D1-D7 roots, existing service roots or any forbidden root; project_root is not nested within pilot_root
open parents and files with no-follow semantics where supported; lstat every component; deny symlink escape, wrong owner, world/group access on private paths, and non-regular Token/decision files
stored digest equals sha256(canonical_json({resolved_posix_path: realpath(path)}))
Ledger/WAL/SHM/locks/Backup and Pilot private state are ignored, not tracked, not staged and absent from candidate tree
current snapshot equals authorized project_snapshot_digest except exact changes allowed by the execution authorization; protected paths remain byte-identical

if permissions intersect {work_item.accept,work_item.approve,work_item.return_for_revision} and also intersect {work_item.ready,work_item.start_delivery,work_item.submit}, combined role flag is true; exact human authorization binds it

the authentication receipt validates against the exact frozen schema, is no older than 120 seconds at Preflight, and binds the exact implementation commit/tree/Wheel/inventory, Scope, Ledger and Tool digest; before listener start Token format/file/Ledger binding is valid; after listener attestation live no-Token/wrong-Token requests return 401 and correct Token returns 200; Principal provenance is local_session; correct proof mints one sealed non-JSON request context bound to exact Lease/process/listener/Principal/session and retired after one command

scope_envelope_sha256, authorized_scope_digest and Lease scope_envelope_digest all equal sha256(canonical_json(scope envelope)); redundant Lease fields equal the Envelope; no command body can override them

before first create the exact proposed ID is preallocated but authorized_work_item_id is null and facts are zero; Preview generated_ids must equal proposed_work_item_id; normalized create digest/origin/objective match Envelope; Apply creates that exact ID and binds Lease authorized_work_item_id in one BEGIN IMMEDIATE; after create both IDs match and only that ID is accepted
each Task Version matches the next authorized digest; maximum three including initial; submitted cannot add a version before return-for-revision

receipt validates against the exact frozen v2 Schema and every slot validates against the exact Attempt Slot Schema; both schema digests and the exact Receipt digest match Envelope, Authorization and Lease; every slot uses bind_after_atomic_create with null Attempt ID; slot IDs and ordinals are unique and contiguous; each retry predecessor exists at a lower ordinal and has the same Task Version payload and objective; each slot binds an authorized Task Version payload digest and objective; maximum_attempts equals slot count; Lease usage starts with an exact available projection of every Slot authority field; create consumes the lowest available slot matching the current Task Version and payload, atomically binds its generated Attempt ID and updates usage; dispatch rechecks exact Work Item/Task/Attempt/slot, project snapshot, objective, executor, paths, expiry and revocation; return-for-revision can consume only a preauthorized later-version slot; missing, stale, replayed or mismatched authority denies

kind is one of evidence_receipt,file,git_commit,git_diff,report,test_report,validation; canonical allowed URI scheme order is project,file,relative; local URI resolves within authorized project roots without symlink escape; SHA-256 matches bytes; immutable_ref is nonempty and not a mutable branch; no sensitive body/credential enters Ledger

event transitions are exact: issued null->prepared, claimed prepared->claimed, attested claimed->active, committed/rejected active->active, write-frozen active->write_frozen, closed active|write_frozen->closed, revoked any nonterminal->revoked, expired any nonterminal->expired; active requires exact process claim and listener attestation; terminal is irreversible

every equation and denied-table invariant in the exact fact reconciliation contract holds before and after mutation; newly committed direct and derived facts do not exceed quotas; exact replay and conflict create no fact/quota/Event; nested Attempt, Artifact, Audit, Outbox and Acceptance Manifest facts share the parent transaction

sequence starts at 1 and is contiguous; first previous digest is null; each later previous digest equals prior canonical event digest; event digest recomputes; state_version_after equals state_version_before+1; every one of the nine event types satisfies its exact transition, identity, listener, command, source, request, principal, fact-delta and rejection-code matrix; close has no command attribution; revoke and expiry identity fields depend exactly on status_before; control and rejected events have zero domain fact delta; command_committed has at least one positive fact delta; at most one command Event per new command and none on replay; total <=64
profile is authoritative_canary with bounded_single_project_pilot.v1 scope mode; exact 14 names match definitions and dispatch; aliases/Actions/Resources/unknown tools deny; prohibited workers absent

the exact stage/fact matrix is enforced for every result: pre-import has null Ledger/Lease/Work Item; bootstrap-prepared has Schema v6 Ledger but no consumed decision/Lease/Work Item; decision-consumed and every later stage require Schema v6 Ledger; lease-issued has a terminal Lease with null authorized ID and zero Work Items; work-item-created has one bound nonterminal Work Item in proposed/ready/in_delivery/submitted with no Acceptance Manifest; lifecycle-completed has exactly one terminal accepted or cancelled Work Item; accepted has exactly one recomputable Manifest and cancelled has none; PASS and PASS_WITH_GAPS require accepted; PASS has zero gaps; PASS_WITH_GAPS has at least one non-authority non-safety evidence gap

listener stopped; Lease terminal; Token revoked/removed and old Token rejected; Shadow restored; decision Tombstoned; append-only evidence and Backup valid; authentication and expiry receipts validate against exact schemas and source bindings; no unauthorized project/other-service/Push/Stable effect

PASS requires passed_rule_ids to equal applicable_rule_ids as sets and failed_rules empty; FAIL requires at least one applicable failed rule; unknown, duplicate or non-applicable rule IDs reject the receipt
